name: Trellis
//capture_links: Opt out of Android's PWA link-capture behavior. Without this, when a user is in mobile Chrome at trellis.necaise.co and triggers any in-domain navigation (including the OAuth redirect that signInWithRedirect kicks off), Android can hijack that navigation and open it in the installed PWA — dropping the OAuth flow's state mid-handshake. 'none' tells Android we are not a default link handler for this domain.
//launch_handler: client_mode: 'navigate-existing' opens an existing PWA window when one is open, or a new one when not. Combined with capture_links: none, this prevents the browser-tab-to-PWA hijack while still letting users launch the PWA normally from the home screen.
